productDisplayName: Lee Women Purple Paula Pansy Top
description: Composition Purple striped top made of 100% cotton, has a round slit neck, chest placket, three fourth sleeves with buttoned cuffs, elasticated on the waist, pintucks and stitched detailing on the front, brand name embroidered at the back of the collar and a curved hemWash care Machine wash with mild detergent in warm water wash dark colours separately Turn inside out before washing and drying Do not bleach, wring or dry clean Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Get back to the basics with this striped top from lee. A great choice for everyday wear, team it with a denim pencil skirt and heeled sandals for a stylish look. Size and FitRegular FitThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8", chest 33"
